sections_cited: Section 38B and 37 of the Sales Tax Act
Section 176 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6940 of 2019 Along with C.P.Nos.284, 285 & 286 of 2020 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 23-12-2024. Mr.Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Nausherwan Adil Memon, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. --- In these petitions notices have been impugned seeking information from the petitioners as per Section 38B and 37 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 and Section 176 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that this information has already been provided and are available with the Department. Learned counsel for Respondent (F.B.R) states that this information shall only be used in accordance with law and if any action is warranted with the respect to the petitioners the same will be taken in accordance with law. In view of foregoing, these petitions are disposed of. Office is directed to place copy of this order in above listed petitions. Judge Judge nasir
